content.query:
SELECT
lower([Division]) as division
,lower([CustomerID]) as prospect_id
,'accept' as [action]
,'email' as [category]
,CAST(DATEDIFF(s,'1970-01-01 00:00:00',getdate())AS BIGINT) as [timestamp]
,'unlimited' as [valid_until]
,cast(getdate() as DATE) as bulk_upload_date
from
[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER]
where
Division = 'FHI'
